name: Binary Search Basics — Classic, First/Last, Insert Position

metadata.career_relevance: Core Binary Search Basics — Classic, First/Last, Insert Position.

hook.what_you_will_build: Binary Search Basics — Classic, First/Last, Insert Position

key_takeaways: Not found: return lo (insert position) or -1
First occurrence: when found, `hi=m-1` (go left for earlier)
Last occurrence: when found, `lo=m+1` (go right for later)
All O(log n): each iteration halves the search space
